search.query: `cisco_oi_index("$cpyKey$")` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:devicegroup | mvexpand groupName | dedup groupName | table groupName | sort groupName

condition.set: [| tstats values(deviceId) as deviceId WHERE ( `cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:devicegroupmember groupName="$groupIdSelected$")]
search [| tstats values(deviceId) as deviceId WHERE ( `cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:devicegroupmember groupName="$groupIdSelected$")]

search.query: `cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:uirdetails | table collectorName, lastUpdatedTimestamp, seenByManagedDeviceName, timestamp, unidentifiedDeviceIpAddress, unidentifiedDeviceName, unidentifiedDevicePlatform, unidentifiedDeviceScore, unidentifiedDeviceSource, unidentifiedDeviceStatus | dedup seenByManagedDeviceName | rename seenByManagedDeviceName as deviceName | rex field=deviceName mode=sed "s/ \(.*//g" | lookup `cisco_oi_device_lookup($cpyKey$)` deviceName OUTPUT deviceId | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | where LIKE(unidentifiedDevicePlatform, "%cisco%") OR LIKE(unidentifiedDevicePlatform, "%Cisco%") OR LIKE(unidentifiedDevicePlatform, "%sns%") OR LIKE(unidentifiedDevicePlatform, "%SNS%") OR LIKE(unidentifiedDevicePlatform, "%ucs%") OR LIKE(unidentifiedDevicePlatform, "%UCS%") OR LIKE(unidentifiedDevicePlatform, "%ise%") OR LIKE(unidentifiedDevicePlatform, "%ISE%") OR LIKE(unidentifiedDevicePlatform, "%WS-C%-%") OR LIKE(unidentifiedDevicePlatform, "%N%-C%") OR LIKE(unidentifiedDevicePlatform, "%AIR-%") OR LIKE(unidentifiedDevicePlatform, "%C9%00%") OR LIKE(unidentifiedDevicePlatform, "%C68%") OR LIKE(unidentifiedDevicePlatform, "%DS-C%") | fields - groupName uirNceComments uirFilter timeStamp | search unidentifiedDevicePlatform!=*AIR* AND unidentifiedDevicePlatform!=*91*AX* AND unidentifiedDevicePlatform!=*cw91* AND unidentifiedDevicePlatform!=*C9136*
| loadjob $BASE$ | stats count as Devices by unidentifiedDevicePlatform | sort -Devices | head 10
